name: dapo-rlvr-frontier
description: Frontier RLVR recipe: DAPO token-level loss + GSPO sequence importance sampling + Clip-Higher asymmetric clip + DAPO dynamic sampling (drop zero-variance groups, oversample to refill). The verifiable reward is code_exec (sandboxed unit tests) which IS the K-score verifier -- train-eval mismatch is a hard error. vLLM rollouts are env-gated (KOLM_VLLM=1 + import vllm). Citations: DAPO arXiv:2503.14476, GSPO arXiv:2507.18071, Dr.GRPO arXiv:2503.20783.

grpo.note: code_exec reward = the K-score verifier; train-eval mismatch is a hard error. Dynamic sampling drops zero-variance groups (sd(r)=0 -> A_i=0). use_vllm is env-gated (KOLM_VLLM=1); falls back LOUD to HF otherwise.

system_prompt: You are a coding model. Reason step by step inside <think>...</think>, then return ONLY the final Python solution in a ```python ... ``` block. The solution must pass the hidden unit tests.
